facilities.name: Garland Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check Garland for current transfer-station hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Disposal fees and resident eligibility rules vary by load type. Confirm current rates before arrival.
not_accepted: Hazardous waste outside posted program rules
facilities.rules: Use the official city guidance to confirm accepted loads, residency rules, and payment methods before driving.

facilities.name: Garland Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Check Garland for current recycling center hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Many city recycling services are resident-focused and may be free for qualifying households. Confirm current rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm accepted materials, sorting requirements, and proof-of-residency rules before driving.

facilities.name: C.M. Hinton Jr. Regional Landfill
facilities.hours: Check Garland for current landfill hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and current city rules. Confirm rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm accepted loads, payment methods, and any resident requirements before driving.

facilities.name: Dallas County Home Chemical Collection Center
facilities.hours: Check Garland's household hazardous waste guidance for current appointment and drop-off requirements before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is generally resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility and item limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm who may use the county HHW program, accepted items, and appointment rules before driving.
